lineDescription: || ||PO415 - 20ml Paint Blend - 36x80mm Complex||Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: 3mm Gap - Rolls of 5,000||Qty: 105,000||5000 x Baby Blue PANTONE 290 C||5000 x Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C||10000 x Black NEUTRAL BLACK C||5000 x Candy PANTONE 218 C||5000 x Chocolate PANTONE 478 C||5000 x Cobalt PANTONE 3005 C||5000 x Green PANTONE 2423 C||5000 x Lavender PANTONE 2092 C||5000 x Lemon 50% PANTONE YELLOW C||5000 x Lime PANTONE 3507 C||5000 x Mint PANTONE 358 C||5000 x Orange PANTONE 1575 C||5000 x Peach PANTONE 489 C||5000 x Purple PANTONE 266 C||10000 x Red PANTONE 1788 C||5000 x Sky Blue PANTONE 305 C||10000 x White 100% WHITE||5000 x Yellow PANTONE 102 C||Group discount applied (PO415/416/425)||
deliveryToAddress: Temper Group ||47 Hargraves Avenue ||Albion Park Rail NSW 2527
